name: ELECTRONIC ARTS INC.
summary: Electronic Arts (EA) is a global digital interactive entertainment company that develops, markets, publishes, and delivers games, content, and services playable on consoles, PCs, and mobile devices. Key franchises include EA SPORTS FC, Madden NFL, EA SPORTS College Football, The Sims, Apex Legends, and Battlefield. Live services, including Ultimate Team extra content and subscriptions, represented 73% of total net revenue in fiscal year 2025.

products.name: EA SPORTS FC
products.description: Annual football franchise available on console, PC, and mobile with multiple business models including free-to-play and subscription.

products.name: Madden NFL
products.description: American football franchise with live services including Ultimate Team mode.

products.name: EA SPORTS College Football
products.description: American college football franchise included within EA's American football live services.

products.name: The Sims
products.description: Life simulation franchise with live services offerings.

products.name: Apex Legends
products.description: Free-to-play first-person shooter with ongoing live services.

products.name: Battlefield
products.description: First-person shooter franchise with live services offerings.

products.name: Ultimate Team
products.description: Live service mode within sports franchises allowing players to collect and compete with personalized teams.

products.name: EA App
products.description: EA's proprietary digital storefront for PC game distribution.

partnerships.description: Publishing agreement granting EA non-exclusive rights to publish games on PlayStation consoles; Sony represented ~39% of total net revenue in fiscal year 2025.
Publishing agreement granting EA non-exclusive rights to publish games on Xbox consoles; Microsoft represented ~17% of total net revenue in fiscal year 2025.
Mobile application distribution through Apple's App Store storefront.
Mobile application distribution through Google's application storefront.
Agreement allowing Tencent to publish EA's mobile and PC free-to-play games in certain countries.
Agreement allowing Nexon to publish EA's mobile and PC free-to-play games in certain countries.
Agreement allowing Garena to publish EA's mobile and PC free-to-play games in certain countries.
Third-party online download store for EA's PC products and services.
